## Title: Replace deprecated localtime() with thread-safe localtime_r()

### Summary
Replace two occurrences of the deprecated `localtime()` function with the thread-safe `localtime_r()` alternative in the `multi-rru-clean.c` utility. The `localtime()` function returns a pointer to a statically allocated struct which is not thread-safe and can be overwritten by subsequent calls. This poses correctness risks for any future multi-threaded usage of the tracer utility. The `localtime_r()` variant st
